T1.name: ABN Lookup
T1.notes: Free public API. Seed tier for Australian businesses.

T1.25.name: ASIC Business Registry
T1.25.notes: Normalizes business name for T2 fuzzy match. Directors pending ASIC DSP approval.

T1.5.name: LinkedIn Company
T1.5.notes: Company-level signals. Does NOT return individual employee names.

T2.name: GMB Bright Data
T2.notes: Uses T1.25 registered_name for improved fuzzy matching.

T2.5.name: GMB Reviews
T2.5.notes: Only for hot leads (ALS ≥85). Intent signal enrichment.

T_DM0.name: LinkedIn DM Discovery
T_DM0.source: DataForSEO SERP + Bright Data LinkedIn Profile (gd_l1viktl72bvl7bjuj0)
T_DM0.notes: CEO Directive #040: DataForSEO SERP discovery + Bright Data profile scraping. Bypasses ASIC DSP dependency.

T3.name: Hunter.io Email
T3.notes: Primary email discovery. Often returns founder-level for SME agencies.

T_DM1.name: LinkedIn by Name
T_DM1.notes: Replaced by T-DM0 which uses SERP discovery. No longer dependent on ASIC DSP.

T_DM2.name: LinkedIn Posts
T_DM2.notes: CEO Directive #041: Social intelligence for outreach personalisation. Async via Bright Data Datasets API.

T_DM3.name: X Posts
input: X handle discovered from website or SERP
x_handle_discovery: 1. Scrape company website for social links (open_website from T2)
T_DM3.notes: CEO Directive #041: Social intelligence for outreach personalisation. Graceful skip if X handle not found.

T_DM2_LEGACY.name: Hunter Domain Search DM
T_DM2_LEGACY.notes: Legacy fallback. Replaced by T-DM2 LinkedIn Posts in Directive #041.

T4.name: ZeroBounce Email Validation
T4.notes: Escalation for catch-all or low confidence emails.

T5.name: Kaspr DM Verification
T5.notes: Premium tier. Only for ALS ≥85 leads.

asic_dsp_application.notes: T-DM0 now bypasses ASIC DSP dependency via SERP discovery

cost_summary.notes: Updated for T-DM2 + T-DM3 (CEO Directive #041). Social intelligence adds ~$0.005/lead for ALS≥70. Compared to Apollo $0.50+ per lead.
